sections.paragraph: m. שְׁפָלָח f. adj. low, of a tree, Eze 17:24 depressed (of a spot on the skin), Lev 13:20, 21 Lev 13:21. Metaph.-(a) ignoble, vile, 2Sa 6:22 Job 5:11.-(b) שְׁפַל רוּחַ cast down, humble of spirit, Pro 29:23 Isa 57:15 and without רוּחַ id.; Isa. loc. cit. הַשָּׁפָ֫לָה that which is low, Eze 21:31 (masc. with ה parag.).
